I agree that cholinomimetics should not be used in managing post-surgical atony or ileus because these conditions benefit from reduced gastrointestinal motility until normal function returns. Using cholinomimetics might interfere with natural healing processes and potentially worsen symptoms like abdominal distension or pain associated with delayed intestinal movement after surgery.
